content.body: annevk: is there precedence for moving issues from incubation to whatwg?
content.formatted_body: annevk: is there precedence for moving issues from incubation to whatwg?

content.body: Hi all, just a friendly reminder to post any discussion topics for this Thursday's joint CSSWG/WHATWG/OpenUI task force meeting to the meeting agenda issue: https://github.com/whatwg/html/issues/12503
